description: An open-source service for tracking the environmental footprint of electricity across Europe.

people.description: An individual who accesses and analyzes environmental impact data through wattnet.
people.name: User

components.description: Python library that provides a function-based interface for interacting with the wattnet API, mapping each endpoint to a corresponding Python function.
components.name: wattnet-client

containers.description: A generic application, script, or notebook built by a third party that integrates with wattnet.
containers.name: Third-Party Application

softwareSystems.description: A third-party system or service that connects to wattnet to retrieve and use environmental impact data.
softwareSystems.name: External Consumer

softwareSystems.description: European Network of Transmission System Operators for Electricity RESTful API.
softwareSystems.name: ENTSO-E Public API

softwareSystems.description: Elexon Insights RESTful API for operational data about the electricity system in Great Britain.
softwareSystems.name: Elexon Insights API

components.description: Provides the persistent page layout: collapsible sidebar, zone detail panel, and responsive mobile sheets.
components.name: Dashboard Shell

components.description: Orchestrates the main dashboard page: date/time range, URL-synced view state, and wiring of map data into the renderer.
components.name: Map View Controller

components.description: Renders zone polygons on an interactive map, choropleth-colored by the selected metric.
components.name: Map Renderer

components.description: Displays animated cross-border power-exchange arrows anchored at real border-crossing coordinates.
components.name: Flow Arrows Overlay

components.description: Metric, dimension, scope, and date/time-range selection controls, including the live-scrub time slider.
components.name: Sidebar Controls

components.description: Provides light, dark and colorblind-safe color palettes for choropleth scales and UI.
components.name: Theme Engine

components.description: Holds shared UI and selection state: active metric, selected zone/flow, panel and layout state.
components.name: Dashboard Store

components.description: Fetches and shapes all dashboard data for the map and panels, and revalidates on demand.
components.name: Data Service

components.description: Polls for newly published data slots, advances the displayed time slot, and triggers revalidation to keep the dashboard current.
components.name: Live Refresh Engine

components.description: Issues short-lived tokens and proxies dashboard requests to the wattnet API, hiding upstream credentials from the browser.
components.name: API Gateway

containers.description: The web dashboard lets you explore all metrics in a clear, interactive, and visually engaging interface.
containers.name: Web Dashboard

containers.description:
Metrics visualization and 
 monitoring dashboards. 
 Only for monitoring.
containers.name: Grafana

containers.description: Command-line tools for dataset extractor, analyzer, and visualizer.
containers.name: Data Tools

components.description: Initializes the FastAPI server and manages the API lifecycle.
components.name: API Runner

components.description: Handles requests related to system domain entities, such as zones and metrics, and routes them to the appropriate service methods.
components.name: Generic Metric Controller

components.description: Contains the business logic for processing and retrieving environmental impact metrics.
components.name: Generic Metric Service

components.description: Provides geographical data and utilities related to latitudes, longitudes, and zone mapping.
components.name: Geo Service

components.description: Provides utilities for performing operations on time-series data, such as aggregation, filtering, and normalization.
components.name: Operations Service

containers.description: Provides a stateless standard interface for accessing environmental impact metrics.
containers.name: RESTful API

components.description: Manages the workflow of the metrics engine.
components.name: Workflow Manager

components.description: Reads environmental characterization factors from the Environmental Database.
components.name: Factors Reader

components.description: Generates the electrical energy map according zones definition and ENTSO-E metrics.
components.name: Map Builder

components.description: Calculates environmental impact metrics by applying the appropriate factors to the electrical energy map.
components.name: Environmental Calculator

components.description: Computes electrical energy upstream distribution matrix using a flow-tracing approach.
components.name: Flow-Tracing Algorithm

components.description: Handles the zones of the electrical energy map, along with their attributes and status.
components.name: Zone Manager

relationships.description: Creates and warms up at startup

components.description: Reads and writes computed metrics to the metrics storage.
components.name: Storage Manager

components.description: Abstract contract implemented by all providers.
components.name: Provider Interface

components.description: Retrieves electricity data from Elexon API.
components.name: Elexon Provider Client

components.description: Persists pre-processed API responses to disk, avoiding redundant external calls.
components.name: Provider Staging Cache

components.description: Controls request rate to external APIs using a shared Redis instance.
components.name: Rate Limit Controller

relationships.description: Reads and writes rate limit counters

components.description: Manages outlier detection and handling in time-series data.

components.description: Detects outliers in time-series data to ensure data quality.
components.name: Outlier Detector

components.description: Manages estimation techniques for handling missing or incomplete data.
components.name: Estimator Manager

components.description: Abstract contract implemented by all estimation techniques.
components.name: Estimator Interface

components.description: Combines multiple estimation techniques to infer missing or incomplete data points in time-series data.
components.name: Hybrid Energy Estimator

components.description: Classifies each zone/source's native data resolution once at startup, giving the outlier guard a durable signal.
components.name: Resolution Registry

components.description: Orchestrates pluggable provider implementations.
components.name: Providers Manager

containers.description: Fetch and processes electricity generation data to compute environmental impact metrics.

relationships.description: Reads and writes rate limit counters

components.description: Abstraction layer for storing and retrieving metrics. Hides backend details.

components.name: Storage Backend Manager

components.name: Storage Backend Interface

components.name: ClickHouse Client

components.description: Open-source column-oriented DBMS (columnar database management system) for online analytical processing (OLAP)
components.name: ClickHouse

containers.description: System for storing and retrieving time-series metrics data.

components.description: Calculates environmental impact metrics by applying the appropriate factors to the forecasted electrical energy map.

components.name: Predictor Interface
